untranslatable_reason: Not a sizing rule. This is an exit/stop-loss condition based on psychological state and market conditions, not a position sizing method. It describes WHEN to exit (emotional fatigue, overconfidence) and references entry timing (before high-conviction trades), but does not specify how to SIZE positions (e.g., risk %, Kelly fraction, volatility scaling, etc.). The parameters provided (session_profit_pct_threshold, session_duration_hours, drawdown_from_peak_pct) define exit triggers, not position sizing allocation rules.
